parameters.content:
Review-queue digest (Track-1 ACCUMULATE)

Needs: Brain Postgres cred + DASHSCOPE_API_KEY/BASE_URL, QWEN_CHAT_MODEL env.
qwen-plus RECOMMENDS approve/reject/hold per pending candidate; never writes memory_facts (human gate). Logs a digest event. Skips when queue empty.

parameters.query: SELECT candidate_id, agent_id, candidate_type, payload_json, confidence, created_at FROM memory_review_queue WHERE status='pending' ORDER BY confidence DESC LIMIT 50;

INSERT INTO memory_events (agent_id, event_type, title, event_text, event_time, metadata_json) VALUES ('shared', 'review.digest', 'Review queue digest', '{{ $json.digest_md }}', NOW(), '{{ $json.metadata }}'::jsonb);
